executives.name: Carolyn Handlon
executives.background: Former Executive Vice President and Treasurer of Marriott International, Inc. Expert in global finance, capital markets, and risk management.

executives.name: Horacio Rozanski
executives.background: Mr. Rozanski is our President and Chief Executive Officer. He has been our CEO since 2015 and President since 2014. He joined the firm in 1992 and has served in various roles including Chief Operating Officer and Chief Strategy and Talent Officer.
